courses.title: Oracle Fusion HCM Techno Functional Course
courses.summary: Build production-ready web apps with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, APIs, authentication, and deployment.
courses.why: This course is for learners who want a practical path into modern web development. Every module is tied to a portfolio-ready project, so students finish with proof of skill instead of only notes.
eligible: College students preparing for internships and placements
Working professionals looking for career growth or change into HCM roles
Working professionals switching into HCM roles
Anyone comfortable using a computer and learning by building
outcomes: All the modules will be covered in the course
Job Support will be provided to the students
Help in resume review and mock interviews

testimonials.name: Ananya R.
testimonials.quote: The projects made interviews easier because I could explain exactly what I had built.

testimonials.name: Karthik M.
testimonials.quote: The data course helped me move from manual reporting to dashboards my team actually uses.

testimonials.name: Neha S.
testimonials.quote: I used the automation lessons to reduce repetitive admin work in my business every week.
